title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes five steps for shipping products with Claude Code, from problem identification to launch. He emphasizes starting with problems, knowing what to engineer vs. outsource, learning vocabulary rather than code syntax, planning before building, and identifying potential failure points. The video demonstrates building a $481k annual revenue product in 45 days with a non-technical founder.
